# terrible_cisco_meraki_meraki_ms_access_policies (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `access_policy_type` (String) Set type of the access policy
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `auth_method` (String) Set authentication method in the policy.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `data_vlan_id` (Number) Set a Data VLAN ID for Critical Auth VLAN
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `guest_vlan` (Number) Guest Vlan
- `host_mode` (String) Choose the Host Mode for the access policy.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) Name of Access Policy.
- `net_id` (String) ID of network.
- `net_name` (String) Name of a network.
- `number` (Number) Number of the access_policy.
- `org_id` (String) ID of organization associated to a network.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `radius_accounting_enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable RADIUS accounting.
- `radius_accounting_servers` (String) List of RADIUS servers for RADIUS accounting.
- `radius_attribute_group_policy_name` (String) Enable that attribute for a RADIUS
- `radius_coa_enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable RADIUS CoA (Change of Authorization).
- `radius_servers` (String) List of RADIUS servers.
- `radius_testing` (Boolean) Set status of testing a radius.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Specifies whether SNMP information should be queried or modified.
- `suspend_port_bounce` (Boolean) Enable or disable the Suspend Port Bounce when RADIUS servers are unreachable.
- `systems_management_enrollment` (Boolean) Set if the Systems Management Enrollemnt is enabled or disabled
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `voice_vlan_clients` (Boolean) If is enabled that means Voice VLAN client require authentication
- `voice_vlan_id` (Number) Set a Voice VLAN ID for Critical Auth VLAN

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `data` (String) List of Access Policies
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
